branches.name: main
branches.description: Maintains the pure TypeScript core foundation, renderer registry, shared protocols, types, capability model, and worker/asset contracts.

branches.name: v2
branches.description: Tracks the Vue 2.7 integration experience while sharing the same @file-viewer/core foundation and public wrapper repository.

branches.name: v3
branches.description: Tracks the Vue 3 baseline viewer and demo experience while sharing the same @file-viewer/core foundation and public wrapper repository.
